message: I can't log into Canvas, it keeps saying my password is wrong even after I reset it twice.
The wifi in the library is completely down, nobody on the third floor can connect.
There's water leaking from the ceiling in the science building hallway near room 204, it's pooling on the floor.
I lost my student ID card somewhere on campus and I need to get into my dorm tonight.
The payment portal charged my account twice for the same parking permit.
Several students reported the elevator in the east wing is stuck between floors with someone possibly inside.
My VPN keeps disconnecting every few minutes so I can't finish submitting my assignment before the deadline.
There is a strong smell of gas near the cafeteria loading dock and staff are concerned.
How do I request a transcript and how long does it usually take to process?
Someone left a backpack unattended in the main lobby for over an hour and people are getting nervous.
